feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Creation of migration object for migrating conditions of open purchase orders
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Unfortunately, it is not possible to migrate conditions for open purchase orders using the standard template in the Migration Cockpit. This presents the challenge of creating a custom migration object using the function module BAPI_PO_CHANGE.

Has anyone already gained experience with this and would be willing to share it? Alternative solutions are also very welcome. I am working on an S/4HANA On-Premise system.

Many thanks in advance!
Marco

entry.title: Variant Configuration Migration in Sales Orders - SAP S/4HANA Private Edition
entry.content:
Hello together,

based on my current analysis, in S/4HANA Private Edition, it is not possible to migrate variant configuration data in sales orders using the Migration Cockpit. In contrast, this functionality is available in S/4HANA Public Edition.

This discrepancy may be due to the fact that the A2X Sales Order API, which could potentially support such capabilities, is currently on the roadmap for Q4/2025 for S/4HANA Private Edition.

Can anyone confirm if this is indeed the reason for the limitation in the Private Edition, and if so, what would be a recommended workaround or alternative approach in the meantime?

https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73555000100800004663&q=api&range=FIRST-LAST#Q1%202025;INNO=139B28CB2E8C1EDEA7B40353415B4277

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/300101 

S/4HANA Public Edition:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d5699934e7004d048c4801b552f3b013/da48c42d19e6484a90795feb509d2fc4.html?locale=en-US

S/4HANA Private Edition:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/d3a3eb7caa1842858bf0372e17ad3909/da48c42d19e6484a90795feb509d2fc4.html?locale=en-US 

Thanks and best regards,

Julian

entry.title: How to activate Business Catalog SAP_CMD_BC_SUPP_MAINT_PC to able the Migration Object Supplier
entry.content:
Dear friends,

I am not being able to use the Migration Object Supplier to create a new vendor by the Migrate Cockpit. Reading the documentation (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d5699934e7004d048c4801b552f3b013/4b0790e529be4779a07a9ca0a9b65d70.html?locale=en-US) i noted that it need to activate its Business Catalog ( SAP_CMD_BC_SUPP_MAINT_PC ).
I already checked in my system and this Business Catalog does not exist.

Can anyone helps me to understand how to activate this Business Catalog or if there is something else that I can do in order to use the Cockpit Migration to create a NEW VENDOR.

Best regards.
Davi Ribeiro
+55 61 99869-8677

entry.title: External Tax - Determine Tax Jurisdiction Codes CO_TAX_JURI_DETER_SPRX missing information
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are using the communication scenario SAP_COM_0177 for external tax calculation integration with Avalara. During the migration of customers to the test system for UAT using the Migration Cockpit, an outbound service for tax jurisdiction code determination is triggered.

We have observed that for many customers, the State/City/Zip Code details are not being sent to CPI. These details are mandatory for Avalara to correctly determine the tax jurisdiction.

Could you please propose how to fix this issue ?

Did someone face the same issue before !? Is there any workaround ?

Attached are screenshots showing examples of both correct and incorrect payloads.

Thanks & Regards,
Karim

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit

entry.title: Optional/Required field change via Migration Object Modeler in Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Folks,

We are facing issue while Migrating Material without Material group in Public cloud, we got the error shown below.

Even though the Product/Material Group is not mandatory in Standard Migration template still we are facing issue.

Need your help to go forward.

Thanks

entry.title: Error DMC_RT_MSG 41 _IT_IO_S
entry.content:
Hello together,

I encounter the following error but do not why it arises. I am doing the migration for fixed assets and this message comes up. Please help me out on this:

entry.title: Hi Team,Open GR/IR balance migration tools in S/4 HanaTo create full PO and to poste legacy GR
entry.content:
Hi Team,
Open GR/IR balance migration tools in S/4 Hana
To create full PO and to poste legacy GR without impacting stock entry.

Legacy system : Non SAP system

Example:

PO created in Legacy 100 Qty, 40 QTY delivered But Invoice not posted in Legacy,

As per Migration process we are migrating 60 Qty through, DMC open PO's migration tool.

expecting below process

Step1: Create PO with full quantity

Step2: Migrate PO history ( Legacy GR) without impacting Stock.

Thanks

entry.title: BP Relationship of Migration Object of Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
Dear All,

I want to migrate BP Relationship.

But, I'm not looking forward the migration object of BP Relationship.

Please let me know how to migrate BP Relationship.

※ The system is Public Cloud 2502

Best Regards

Yuki Tsumura

entry.title: How to use Product migration object for Retail
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We noticed that the materials being uploaded with the app Migration Cockpit, Migration Object "Product", aren't being sent as Retail to the system, but rather as normal materials. Our question then is:

  • How do we use the Migration Object "Product" to upload Retail data to the system?

If it helps, we're currently running an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023, FPS 02. Thanks!

Best regards,
Data migration experts


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: DDIC Structure for Migration Cockpit Objects
entry.content:
Hello,

we are trying to export data from our sap system to another sap system using the CSV files generated by the S/4 HANA Migration Cockpit. Thes file format is based on specific table structures as seen in image below (in this example for the customer object):

The issue is that we cannot find any corresponding DDIC structures such as "S_CUST_GEN". Do these table structures exist within the SAP System? Or is there a piece of code where these structures are dynamically created from where one could copy them to a DDIC structure?

Thank you, Victor

entry.title: Supplier direct transfer approach - BUT000 no entry
entry.content:
Hello dear SAP Community,

currently, I am trying to migrate suppliers from an SAP ERP system to a HANA 2022 SP4 system using the direct transfer approach in the Migration Cockpit. Unfortunately, I am facing two issues:

  1. Business partners are not being migrated, only suppliers (no entry in BUT000).
    1. The structure: with the BP ROLES is filled with 2 entries.
  2. The internal number assignment is not working. I receive the message:
    1. Business partner ##1 is not present --- R1-201.

By using the Staging approach with XML the function module is filled nearly the same and everything is working fine.

Thank you for your advice and best regards,

Lukas

entry.title: How to add other depreciation areas to migrated assets and delete data for migrated assets
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support, 

If I want to add value data to other depreciation areas for assets migrated using the "Migration Cockpit" app, is it possible to do so?
(Please tell me if there is a way other than using the "Post Transfer Values ​​- For Legacy Asset" app.) 
If possible, please tell me how to add data. 

 

Also, is it possible to delete data for many assets that have been migrated at once? (Please answer using a method other than using the Reset Transaction Data job template from the app Schedule Accounting Data Corrections.)
If possible, please tell me how to delete data.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 🚛 Migration vs. ⬆️ Upgrade: Understanding the SAP Essentials (With Real‑World Clarity!)
entry.content:
Ever heard someone say "We're upgrading to S/4HANA" when they really meant “migrating” to HANA? You’re not alone—these terms are often misunderstood, but knowing the difference is critical 💡. 

Whether you're a consultant, a technical architect, or part of a functional team, or Business users understanding the difference is crucial for planning, execution, and business alignment. Knowing the difference between migration and upgradation can help you communicate better, plan smarter, and execute projects more efficiently.

 

🏗️ Migration = Moving House

You're shifting your entire SAP landscape—platform, database, and deployment environment.
Common Scenarios:

  • On‑Prem Oracle → SAP HANA

  • On‑Prem → Cloud

  • Legacy ERP → S/4HANA (Greenfield)

Tools: SAP Migration Cockpit, DMO, LSMW, Data Services
Focus: Data quality, performance, scalability

🛠️ Upgrade = Renovation

Same house, but with brand‑new features and updates.
Typical Use‑Cases:

  • ECC 6.0 EHP5 → EHP8

  • NetWeaver, GUI → Fiori UX

  • ECC → S/4HANA via Brownfield

Tools: SUM, Maintenance Planner, SPAM/SAINT
Focus: Functionality, user experience, compliance

🔍 Quick Comparison

Factor Migration Upgrade
GoalNew platformNew version
Change TypeTech + functionalFunctional only
Data HandlingETL / cleansed loadRetain existing data
Risk LevelHigherLower
When to Choose?DB switch, greenfieldNew features, UX, support
 

🎯 Which One Do You Need?

  • Migration = Changing where or how your SAP runs

  • Upgrade = Improving what’s already there

👉 Why It Matters

  • Align teams: set clear technical vs. business objectives

  • Optimize planning: scope, budget, risk & tool choice

  • Improve communication: speak the same language across IT & business

📣 From the SAP Community

Have you tackled a migration or upgrade?

  • What was your biggest challenge—data cleanup, downtime, custom code?

  • Any tools or tips you swear by?

Drop your insights below—let’s build a resource together! 👇

📲 Let's Connect

Follow me for more SAP & S/4HANA insights, and reach out if you want to dive deeper!
LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/in/mirza-hasan-051369231

entry.title: Migration for Asset Under Construction in S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Our fiscal period runs from April to March. Currently, we are uploading the opening data for April.

For Assets Under Construction (AUC), I have uploaded  using transaction type 900.

While all other asset balances are correctly dated March 31, 2025, the AUC amount is being recorded with April 1, 2025. I also migrated the GL opening balance with the date 31.3.2025. When I checked the opening balance in the trial balance with the date 31.3.2025, the AUC amount did not appear, but when I generated it with 1.4.2025, it showed up. As a result, the GL opening balance doesn’t match. What should I do about this? Has anyone else faced this case? How did you handle it? 

Could you please advise on the correct approach?

Best Regards,

Hnin

entry.title: Customer direct transfer approach with contact person
entry.content:
Hello dear SAP community,

I'm currently trying to migrate customers from an SAP ERP system to a HANA 2022 SP4 system. I'm using the direct transfer in the migration cockpit. Unfortunately, I'm having problems when the customer is assigned a contact person.

I'm getting the error message "Business partner ##1 does not exist." Error message R1-201

Where do I need to change the number assignment in Customizing so that the transfer works? Should it be possible to transfer business partners with contact persons using internal number assignment in one go?

Thank you for your tips and kind regards,

Lukas

entry.title: Supplier - extend existing record by multiple addresses is not visible in migrate your data app
entry.content:
How to make visible the supplier-extend existing record by multiple addresses in data migration cockpit?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BOM component loaded wrongly in Routing
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I am using LTMC to create ROUTING and in Component Assignment tab the information for ITEM ID , BOM Component and Item Number is mismatch when compare to BOM, like ITEM ID and Item Number are not matched with the BOM Component which I want to load. Due to which the BOM Component tagged to that routing is wrong. 

Now we want to remediate the data means wants to update the correct BOM Component . Need your advise on how to achieve that.

 

Thanks,

RJ

entry.title: Migration cockpit: Value mapping tables
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to use Data Migration cockpit to load customers from legacy system post transformation from ETL tool using staging tables. In DMC I can see in the Mapping tasks there is specific item named  "Mapping of Customer". This table shows the Customer Key that I used vs the BP ID used by the system.

Where does this information gets saved? How do I access this, apart from this mapping task where in I want to download the legacy vs SAP BP number.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: S4HANA LTMC
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to upload the General Data for a few customers and have chosen the BP grouping as Z001 which is internal number range.

The KUNNR field for On-Prem has been set to Visible from required in the appropriate Migration Object in Change View of Source Structure.

After the Upload file process and Data Transfer process I am getting the error attached .

Please find attached the file and the snapshot of the error .

Can someone please guide me and let me know what is going wrong.

Regards.

SM

entry.title: How to activate the field 'calculate tax automatically' (XMWST) field in AP Open Items LTMC
entry.content: How to activate the field 'calculate tax automatically' (XMWST) field for AP Open Items while loading with LTMC technique during the creation of an invoice to get the tax lines.
